search_document:
User Request: Employee sales trends.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue by Employee
Type: chart
Description: Trend of monthly revenue generated by each employee
Title: Top Employees by Sales
Type: table
Description: Employees with the highest sales figures
Title: Total Revenue by Employee
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue generated by all employees
Title: Sales Performance by Region
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance of employees across different regions
Title: Sales Growth Rate
Type: kpi
Description: Percentage growth in sales over the last period

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue by Employee
sql_queries.description: Trend of monthly revenue generated by each employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, Month ORDER BY Month, EmployeeName

sql_queries.title: Top Employees by Sales
sql_queries.description: Employees with the highest sales figures
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue by Employee
sql_queries.description: Overall revenue generated by all employees
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Sales Performance by Region
sql_queries.description: Sales performance of employees across different regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.Region, e.EmployeeID ORDER BY e.Region, Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Sales Growth Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage growth in sales over the last period
sql_queries.sql: WITH MonthlySales AS (SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month), Growth AS (SELECT Month, Revenue, LAG(Revenue) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS PreviousRevenue FROM MonthlySales) SELECT (Revenue - PreviousRevenue) / PreviousRevenue * 100.0 AS GrowthRate FROM Growth WHERE PreviousRevenue IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Month DESC LIMIT 1
